title: Define atlas import, export, and migrate CLI contracts with fixtures
description: Add the CLI-level migration story for Atlas and legacy catalogs so Sentinel can act as a compatibility layer instead of forcing a flag-day switch.
acceptanceCriteria: Sentinel has a documented CLI contract for importing, exporting, or migrating Atlas-related catalog data
Fixtures cover at least one Atlas-style and one legacy catalog example
The migration contract is explicit about what is transformed, what is preserved, and what remains Atlas-owned
Help and docs read like a compatibility layer rather than a product-specific one-off
proofRequirements: CLI docs or tests cover the command contract
sample fixtures exist for Atlas and legacy paths
nonGoals: breaking existing sentinel catalog commands immediately

notes.text: Execution started for the Atlas migration CLI contract. This slice adds import/export/migrate command surfaces, fixtures, and docs without forcing a flag-day migration.

Completed the Atlas import/export/migrate compatibility contract with CLI command surfaces, legacy and Atlas example fixtures, and migration docs that state clearly what Sentinel transforms, preserves, and leaves Atlas-owned.
